The '''GBp-629 hyperdrive''' was a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] unit that was manufactured and produced by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]]. It was installed on the second 'B' model of the [[Helix-class light interceptor]], which was built by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]], in order to make the Helix faster at [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] speeds. Other than hyperdrive performance specifications and minor configuration options, the GBp-629 was virtually identical to the [[GBp-625 hyperdrive]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Galaxy of Fear: City of the Dead]]'' {{1st}}
